heading: The finishing layer.
lede: A full Daltile showroom plus natural stone and glass mosaics — set by the same crew that installs your counters.
credit: Room scenes courtesy of Daltile. WGMT is an authorized Daltile dealer.

catalog.heading: Browse the Daltile catalog
catalog.lede: Flip through the full product catalog right here, or take it with you — Daltile's ProExchange app puts products, pricing, and ordering on your phone.

cta.text: Bringing a backsplash idea? We'll match it to your stone.
